narrative:
Crane Twp & Cecil (precinct in Paulding County) has 838 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.3 percentage points.
